subject: Urgent Request: Backend Engineer – Go
body:
Hi,

We have a new opening in the telecom/media sector that might be of interest.

Our client is looking for a senior Backend Engineer with strong experience in Go. The right candidate has solid knowledge of:

  • Go

Details:
Client: StreamNord
Start: 2024-03-26
Duration: 6 months
Location: Stockholm (hybrid)
Rate: up to 1025 SEK/h

Don't hesitate to get in touch!

Best regards,
Maria Svensson
Senior Talent Manager
Konsult Partners
Tel: +46 70 567 89 01
